consulates.name: Consulate General of India, Seattle
consulates.address: Federal Reserve Building, 1015 2nd Avenue, Suite 100 & 1100, Seattle, WA 98104
consulates.contactNote: Email hoc.seattle@mea.gov.in for non-consular matters including cultural partnerships
culturalProgrammingTrackRecord: India Culture Week at Seattle University (Nov 2024)
Swami Vivekananda Monument with ICCR & City of Seattle (Apr 2026)
Swami Vivekananda Statue at Westlake Square
First India Day Parade Seattle (Aug 2025) — all 28 states
First Baisakhi at WA State Capitol (Apr 2025)
India Showcased at Asia Pacific Cultural Center, Tacoma (Mar 2025)
consulates.whyTheyMatter: Most active consulate on West Coast for cultural programming. India Culture Week 2024 is the clearest precedent template for our festival. Active state-government engagement across the 8-state jurisdiction.

consulates.name: Consulate General of India, San Francisco
consulates.address: 71 Stevenson Street, Suite 2200, San Francisco, CA 94105
consulates.contactEmail: Contact via CG office; check website for cultural affairs email
consulates.jurisdictionNote: Some states are shared jurisdiction with Seattle; Seattle has primary for PNW
culturalProgrammingTrackRecord: Swami Vivekananda 125th Anniversary Musical Tribute at Center for the Performing Arts, San Jose (Jul 2025)
International Day of Yoga at Golden Gate Bridge (annual)
San Jose ICAC (Indian Consular Application Centre) launch
Attorney General of India and California AG meetings at Consulate
consulates.whyTheyMatter: Established consulate with deep institutional relationships. Proven ability to activate top-tier Indian classical artists and major venues. Jurisdiction covers 12 states including California.

consulates.name: Consulate General of India, Los Angeles
consulates.address: 707 Wilshire Blvd, Suite 4500, Los Angeles, CA 90017
culturalProgrammingTrackRecord: Launch event with India International Impact and American South Asian Network (Jan 2026)
Eric Garcetti participation (former US Ambassador to India)
keyPartners: City of Los Angeles Office of International Affairs
consulates.whyTheyMatter: New consulate hungry for marquee cultural engagements. Strong Year 2 expansion target once Seattle+Bay Area pilot is proven. LA Olympics 2028 narrative creates long-term cultural framing.

consulates.name: Embassy of India, Washington D.C.
consulates.consulGeneral: Ambassador of India to the US
consulates.contactNote: fspic.washington@mea.gov.in is the cultural affairs contact
consulates.whyTheyMatter: For any bi-coastal program, looping Embassy DC in provides federal-level cover. Primary US liaison to ICCR HQ in Delhi.
